_comment_downloads_dir: Where you drop Cursor team-usage CSV exports. Defaults to your Downloads folder.
_comment_report_dir: Where weekly token-check markdown reports are saved.
_comment_history_dir: JSON snapshots for trend charts (one file per week). Created automatically.
_comment_reference_docs_dir: Folder containing token-budgeting-companion.md and token-action-card.md. Copy from cursor-doc-skills/docs/token-efficiency/ or point at your checkout.
_comment_baseline: Frozen comparison point from your first usage analysis. Update only when you deliberately reset your baseline — not every week.
_comment_check_day: Optional. Day of week for a recurring reminder (0=Sunday … 6=Saturday). Leave unset if you run manually only.
